name: TextureType
summary: The TextureType controls how the pixels in the bitmap are interpreted.

enum_values.name: Bitmap
enum_values.summary: Deprecated - this should be diffuse

enum_values.name: Diffuse
enum_values.summary: The diffuse color of the material, ideally the albedo.

enum_values.name: Bump
enum_values.summary: bump map

enum_values.name: Transparency
enum_values.summary: Deprecated - see Opacity. This has always actually meant opacity in Rhino, so there is nothing to change.

enum_values.name: Opacity
enum_values.summary: value = alpha

enum_values.name: Emap
enum_values.summary: Emap/Environment texture

enum_values.name: PBR_BaseColor
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - base color. Re-uses diffuse texture slot.

enum_values.name: PBR_Subsurface
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - subsurface (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_SubsurfaceScattering
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - subsurface scattering

enum_values.name: PBR_SubsurfaceScatteringRadius
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - subsurface scattering radius (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_Metallic
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - metallic (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_Specular
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - specular (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_SpecularTint
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - specular tint (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_Roughness
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - roughness (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_Anisotropic
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - anisotropic (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_Anisotropic_Rotation
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - anisotropic rotation 0 = 0, 255 = 360

enum_values.name: PBR_Sheen
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - sheen (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_SheenTint
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - sheen tint (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_Clearcoat
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - clearcoat (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_ClearcoatRoughness
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - clearcoat roughness (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_OpacityIor
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - ior (greyscale - remaps from 1.0 to 2.0)

enum_values.name: PBR_OpacityRoughness
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - transparency roughness (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_Emission
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - emission (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_AmbientOcclusion
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - occlusion (greyscale)

enum_values.name: PBR_Displacement
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - normal 8-bit RGB, alpha is ignored

enum_values.name: PBR_ClearcoatBump
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - clearcoat normal or bump (normal map, RGB)

enum_values.name: PBR_Alpha
enum_values.summary: Physically based materials only - clearcoat normal or bump (normal map, RGB)
